title: eriogonum umbellatum var. nelsoniorum
intro: Eriogonum umbellatum var. nelsoniorum, also known as Nelson's sulphur flower or Nelson's buckwheat, is a variety of flowering plant in the buckwheat family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The plant has various health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, and it has been traditionally used to treat conditions such as arthritis and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Eriogonum umbellatum var. nelsoniorum can be made into teas, salves, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
